dict.string: The familiar notes when you are home or away — only "home" or "away", never your coordinates.
The familiar notes home/away in the background so it can serve you without the app open. Only "home" or "away" is ever sent — never your coordinates.
The familiar notes coarse activity (walking, driving, still) — never raw motion data.
Used to scan a familiar's join QR code, and (if you enable it) on-device facial presence analysis — never a stored image.
Push-to-talk: your spoken note is transcribed on-device and sent to the familiar. No audio leaves the device.
Transcribes your push-to-talk speech on-device so the familiar can act on it.
